steps.title: Identify the core requirement
steps.content: The goal is explicit: provide an example of a fruit that contains vitamin C. This demands naming a specific fruit—not just mentioning “fruits” in general—and connecting it to vitamin C.

steps.title: Select the choice that supplies the specific example
steps.content: B names pineapple and identifies it as containing vitamin C. The other three choices discuss the broader context of humans and vitamin C but fail to specify which fruit serves as the concrete example. B is correct.
